name: 01_triggered_high_ticks_preserved
description: Branch 1 (is_triggered=True): both tick counters PRESERVED unchanged regardless of all other inputs, both broken flags False.
derivation: is_triggered=True -> the producer's `if not bot_state[...]['triggered']:` guard fails at the OUTER level; the entire vwap-block (including the reset-else branch) is skipped. Both tick counters are NEITHER incremented NOR reset; they are preserved exactly at their input values (7, 9). is_vwap_broken / is_vwap_bleed_broken stay at their initial False, since the inline producer initializes them False BEFORE the guard. Returns (7, 9, False, False).
